heading: Repealed. [title IV, § 474(e)], ,Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983
label: 4528 to 4532 Repealed. [title IV, § 474(e)], ,Pub. L. 98–181, title I97 Stat. 1239Nov. 30, 1983
notes: Section 4528, , , , provided for termination of new community development projects under chapter 48 (§ 3901 et seq.) of this title and transition provisions for projects under this part.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 727(a)84 Stat. 1802Dec. 31, 1970

Section 4529, , , , provided for application of Federal labor standards for laborers and mechanics employed by contractors and subcontractors in new communities development program.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 727(f)84 Stat. 1803Dec. 31, 1970

Section 4530, , , , directed that the interest paid on obligations issued by State land development agencies be included as gross income for purposes of chapter 1 of title 26.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 727(g)84 Stat. 1803Dec. 31, 1970

Section 4531, , , , authorized use of funds under the new communities development program jointly with funds available under other Federal assistance programs.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 72884 Stat. 1803Dec. 31, 1970

Section 4532, , , ; , (b), , , provided for establishment and operation of New Community Development Corporation within Department of Housing and Urban Development.Pub. L. 91–609, title VII, § 72984 Stat. 1804Pub. L. 93–383, title VIII, § 803(a)88 Stat. 725Dec. 31, 1970Aug. 22, 1974
